Meath Bowling Club

Membership

Join Meath Bowling Club

Become part of a friendly sports community with events, coaching, and member-only updates.

Why join

Support the club

Members help keep the club strong and connected through events, coaching, and community spirit.

Member benefits

Get more from the club

Enjoy member-only notices, documents, and invitations to private club events.

How to join

Simple sign-up process

Contact us to start your membership journey and learn more about club activities.

Membership process

Step 1

Contact us

Ask about membership and upcoming welcome sessions.

Step 2

Visit the club

Meet members and see the green before joining.

Step 3

Become a member

Receive full access to member resources and events.

Need help?

If you have questions about membership, email us or use the contact form on the website.

Contact the club

Meath Bowling Club

Friendly, community-first lawn bowls in Meath. Everyone is welcome, whether you're new or returning.
